_description: ClawSentinel Living Audit Error Log — append-only across all cycles

_entry_fields.svt: Session Verification Token from the package that triggered this entry
_entry_fields.detected_by: ROLE-ID of the AI that found this (e.g. CHATGPT-ADVERSARIAL-REVIEWER)
_entry_fields.error_class: One of the defined error classes below
_entry_fields.location: File path or document name where error was found
_entry_fields.resolution: How it was resolved, or null if open
_entry_fields.resolved_at: ISO date of resolution, or null
_entry_fields.recurrence_count: How many cycles this error class has appeared
_entry_fields.log_entry_ref: AI_AUDIT_LOG.md entry ID associated with this fix, or null

_error_classes.MANIFEST_MISSING_PART: One or more relay parts absent from package
_error_classes.MANIFEST_HASH_MISMATCH: File hash does not match MANIFEST.sha256
_error_classes.STALE_PART_COUNT: Document references wrong number of relay parts
_error_classes.MISSING_SOURCE_FILE: Source file listed in init prompt not present in relay
_error_classes.SOURCE_PARSE_ERROR: TypeScript/JS parse error in reassembled source
_error_classes.SOURCE_CHUNK_SPLIT: String or token split at chunk boundary during packaging
_error_classes.SOURCE_PLACEHOLDER: Literal placeholder text found in source content
_error_classes.TASK_CROSSREF_ERROR: Task file references wrong part counts, missing files, or stale state
_error_classes.TASK_PREREQ_MISSING: Task depends on prior session output not included in package
_error_classes.SECURITY_FINDING: New bypass or vulnerability identified in review
_error_classes.CONTINUITY_STALE_REF: Onboarding/continuity doc contains stale cycle reference
_error_classes.BUILD_REGRESSION: Change broke previously passing tests or parse checks

entries.description: All three task files referenced 'parts 01-26' — stale from beta13. Package contained 20 parts.
entries.context: SOURCE FILES: Attach relay package parts 01-26.
entries.resolution: Fixed to 01-20 in DIST-PACKAGE-FIXED. Later updated to 01-23 when missing files added.

entries.description: ONBOARDING-CONTINUITY-v3.4 contained stale 26-part relay references in two places.
entries.context: SCR-CHATGPT.zip — all 26 relay parts / SCR-GROK.zip — all 26 relay parts
entries.resolution: Updated all 26-part references to 23-part in v2 package.

entries.description: Three source files listed in NEW-CYCLE-INIT-PROMPT were absent from the relay: skill-scanner-types.ts, sentinel-hardening.ts, sentinel-routes.ts.
entries.context: 16 files present; init prompt lists 19. Missing: src/security/skill-scanner-types.ts, src/security/sentinel-hardening.ts, src/security/sentinel-routes.ts
entries.resolution: Recovered from beta13 relay and added as parts 21-23. Total now 23 parts / 19 files.

entries.description: String literal 'suspicious.' split across part01/part02 chunk boundary in skill-scanner.ts.
entries.context: Part01 ends: ...are suspici</file> | Part02 starts: ous.,
entries.resolution: Completed string in part01, removed continuation from part02.

entries.description: Literal '[complete file contents]' placeholder at end of sentinel-memory.ts chunk 2.
entries.context: [complete file contents] appeared after resetSentinelMemory() — file was actually complete, placeholder was spurious.
entries.resolution: Removed the placeholder line. File content confirmed complete against beta13 reference.

entries.description: Missing closing brace in skill-sandbox.ts if-block. clearTimeout/finish/return were outside the violationThreshold if-block.
entries.context: if (violationCount >= violationThreshold) { killedReason = 'invalid-ipc'; child.kill('SIGKILL'); [MISSING }] clearTimeout...
entries.resolution: Added missing closing brace. Corrected indentation of clearTimeout/finish/return to be inside if-block.

entries.description: describe() string literal 'inject-node-internal-binding' split across part17/part18 chunk boundary in skill-scanner.test.ts.
entries.context: Part17 ends: describe("inject-node-in</file> | Part18 starts: ternal-binding", () => {
entries.resolution: Completed describe() call in part17, removed continuation from part18.

entries.description: Dynamic ESM import() bypasses BLOCKED_MODULES require() wrapper in skill-runner.js. import('vm') succeeds even when require('vm') is blocked.
entries.context: await import('vm') succeeds; require('vm') blocked. ESM import not in blocklist.

entries.description: BP-008 IPC flood still open: no message-rate or byte-rate limiter. Strike counter only increments on schema/network violations, not message volume.
entries.context: Child can send many valid small messages to monopolize parent event loop. Token bucket recommended: 20 msg/s, 128 KB/s, per-type quotas.

entries.description: TASK-CHATGPT requires resuming from a prior session's truncated response (truncated after 'Example attack:' in Q1). Prior response not included in package.
entries.context: Task says 'resume from prior truncated Round 3 response' but no prior response is included in the package.
entries.resolution: README-AND-RUN.txt now provides explicit context for ChatGPT to resume from.

entries.description: skill-sandbox.ts still had a missing closing brace on if (!parsed.success) block — outer block never closed before const msg = parsed.data.
entries.context: if (!parsed.success) block re-opened but outer closing } was absent before const msg assignment and switch.
entries.resolution: Added closing } and standalone return; before const msg = parsed.data. Fixed in v3 package.

entries.description: TASK-GEMINI requires clawsentinel-patch.mjs which was absent from the relay.
entries.context: OPEN-017 deliverable references clawsentinel-patch.mjs for Grok finding cross-review.
entries.resolution: Representative patch.mjs added as part25of25 in v3 package.

entries.description: TASK-GEMINI requires CONTRIBUTING.md which was absent from the relay.
entries.context: CONTRIBUTING.md was in beta13 relay (part25of26) but omitted from beta14 package.
entries.resolution: CONTRIBUTING.md added as part24of25 in v3 package.

entries.description: TASK-GROK scanSource() command uses plain node require() which does not work against TypeScript relay source.
entries.context: node -e "const { scanSource } = require('./src/security/skill-scanner')" fails — relay is .ts, not compiled .js.
entries.resolution: Open — requires documentation that ts-node/tsx is needed, or updating command to use tsx.

entries.description: Confirmed bypass BP-009: exfil-buffer-encode-chain misses globalThis['Buffer'] + Reflect.get alias + variable-held codec.
entries.context: scanSource() missed: const B = globalThis['Buffer']; Reflect.get(B,'from')(src).toString(codec);

entries.description: Confirmed bypass BP-010: exfil-variable-indirection-headers misses multi-hop staging + Headers.set().
entries.context: scanSource() missed: process.env.API_KEY → s1 → s2 → headers.set(name, s2) → fetch(url)

entries.description: Confirmed bypass BP-011: inject-dynamic-jailbreak misses token-array assembly via .join().
entries.context: scanSource() returned no finding for ['ignore','previous','instructions'].join(' ')

entries.description: Confirmed bypass BP-012: supply-unverified-external-import misses dynamic import(variable).
entries.context: scanSource() returned no finding for: const pkg='left-pad'; await import(pkg);

entries.description: Confirmed bypass BP-013: credential-hardcoded-inline still misses fragmented reconstruction via concatenation.
entries.context: const p1 = 'sk-proj-abcde'; const p2 = 'fghijklmnop'; const apiKey = p1 + p2; — not flagged.

entries.description: Confirmed bypass BP-014: inter-agent-recursive-invoke misses detached method alias invocation.
entries.context: const fn = agent.invoke; fn({ agentId: 'self', task: 'recurse' }); — not flagged.

entries.description: inject-node-internal-binding misses Reflect.get(process,'binding') source form at scanner level (runtime deletion still works).
entries.context: const getBinding = Reflect.get(process,'binding'); getBinding?.('fs'); — no scanner finding. Runtime delete still blocks actual recovery.

entries.description: README-AND-RUN.txt still said '23 source parts' after v2→v3 update.
entries.context: STEP 1 instructed verification of 23 parts; actual package had 25.
entries.resolution: Fixed to 25 in v4 package.

entries.description: README-AND-RUN.txt still said 'Expected output: 19 files' after v2→v3 added 2 files.
entries.context: STEP 3c and STEP 6 both said '19 files'; actual relay reassembles to 21.
entries.resolution: Fixed to 21 in v4 package.

entries.description: Rule count corrected to 66 in v3 docs but source truth is 62. LINE 25 + SOURCE 19 + ROUND3 6 + ROUND4 4 + OWASP_GAP 3 + OWASP_BETA12 5 = 62.
entries.context: Claude's SOURCE_RULES count was 23 due to greedy regex; actual count is 19. Runtime getAllRuleMetadata() confirms 62.
entries.resolution: Corrected to 62 across all docs in v4 package.

entries.description: TASK-GROK scanSource() command still used require() instead of tsx/import after v3 attempted fix.
entries.context: sed-based fix in v3 did not match actual string form in file.
entries.resolution: Command updated to npx tsx in v4 package.

entries.description: TASK-GROK still referenced 68 rules and had no vitest/package.json prerequisite warning.
entries.context: Task said '51 of 68 rules'; no warning about needing npm install before running vitest.
entries.resolution: Rule count corrected to 62; vitest prerequisite warning added in v4.

entries.description: tsc --noEmit still fails. Root cause: missing node_modules (express, zod, better-sqlite3, vitest, logging/subsystem, etc.) — these are dependency environment issues, not source bugs. All alleged missing exports (getAllRuleMetadata, encrypt, decrypt, redactLogMessage) ARE present in source; errors are tsc cascade from unresolvable external imports.
entries.context: Full compile requires: npm install + tsc project build. Relay is source-only and cannot compile standalone without its dependency graph.
entries.resolution: Documented in README-AND-RUN as a known constraint. Full compile verified against actual repo only.

entries.description: CONTRIBUTING.md rule structure used stale schema: `patterns` array with /gi flags instead of single `pattern: RegExp` with no /g. Field names `id`, `title`, `remediation` did not match actual RuleMetadata type (`ruleId`, `message`, `remediationNote`). ADR-007 checklist item missing.
entries.location: CONTRIBUTING.md — Writing a New Detection Rule section
entries.resolution: Schema corrected to match actual ScanRule type. Checklist updated with /g flag warning and ADR-007 compliance item.

entries.description: Gemini reported clawsentinel-patch.mjs appeared truncated — writeFile not visible. Investigated: file is complete. fs.writeFile is present inside `if (!isDryRun)` guard. Gemini missed the conditional branch.
entries.resolution: Not a real truncation. No action needed. Noted for relay packaging clarity.

entries.description: Pattern C regression replay revealed 3 scanner rule misses. ChatGPT correctly identified BP-011 (inject-dynamic-jailbreak). Claude verification corrected ChatGPT errors on BP-001, BP-003, BP-012 (all actually TRIGGERED). Claude also found BP-002 (require branch missing) and BP-010 (variable indirection not caught) as genuine misses.
entries.resolution: Fixed inject-worker-thread (add require branch), exfil-variable-indirection-headers (broader headers.set pattern), inject-dynamic-jailbreak (variable-assigned array catch). 20260312-060-CLAUDE.

entries.description: supply-unverified-external-import pattern only matched static ESM import syntax, missing dynamic import('pkg') form. ChatGPT D4F1 confirmation pass caught this.
entries.resolution: Added dynamic import() branch to pattern. 20260312-062-CLAUDE.
